name: tremor
description: Seismic intelligence construct for the Echelon prediction market framework. Ingests USGS/EMSC/IRIS real-time earthquake feeds, builds density-normalized evidence bundles, runs five Theatre types for binary and multi-class prediction markets, and exports Brier-scored RLMF training certificates with full position history and temporal analysis.
short_description: Seismic prediction markets with ground-truth RLMF export
author: El Capitan

verification_checks.description: Magnitude, location, and depth in evidence bundles match USGS reviewed values

verification_checks.ground_truth: USGS event status field (automatic to reviewed transition)
verification_checks.description: Settlement tier assignment matches actual USGS review state and timing

verification_checks.ground_truth: Theatre outcome vs closing position, independently verifiable
verification_checks.description: Brier scores in RLMF certificates are mathematically correct against recorded positions and outcomes

verification_checks.ground_truth: EMSC seismicportal.eu magnitude for same event
verification_checks.description: Cross-validation divergence values match actual magnitude difference between USGS and EMSC

verification_checks.ground_truth: USGS reviewed catalog query at theatre close time
verification_checks.description: Theatre outcomes match what the USGS catalog shows for the region and timeframe

theatre_templates.name: Magnitude Gate
theatre_templates.question_template: Will a M≥{threshold} event occur in {region} within {window}?

theatre_templates.name: Aftershock Cascade
theatre_templates.question_template: Given mainshock M≥{trigger_mag}, how many M≥{threshold} aftershocks within {window}?

theatre_templates.name: Swarm Watch
theatre_templates.question_template: Will active cluster in {zone} produce M≥{threshold} within 7 days?

theatre_templates.name: Depth Regime
theatre_templates.question_template: Will next M≥{threshold} in {subduction_zone} be shallow or deep?

theatre_templates.name: Oracle Divergence
theatre_templates.question_template: Will USGS reviewed magnitude for {event_id} differ from automatic by >=0.3?

settlement_tiers.name: provisional_mature
settlement_tiers.condition: status=automatic AND age>2h AND stable AND quality>0.5 AND cross_validated
